organizations.context: defines appropriate Federal banking agency in section 3

organizations.context: subject to Federal Housing Finance Agency jurisdiction for AI test projects

organizations.name: Federal Deposit Insurance Corporation
organizations.context: financial regulatory agency means the Federal Deposit Insurance Corporation

organizations.context: financial regulatory agency means the Office of the Comptroller of the Currency

legislation_refs.name: Unleashing AI Innovation in Financial Services Act
legislation_refs.context: This Act may be cited as the "Unleashing AI Innovation in Financial Services Act".

legislation_refs.name: Federal Deposit Insurance Act
legislation_refs.context: section 3 defines appropriate Federal banking agency

legislation_refs.name: Securities Exchange Act of 1934
legislation_refs.context: referenced multiple times for SEC jurisdiction over brokers, dealers, clearing agencies, and other entities

legislation_refs.name: Investment Company Act of 1940
legislation_refs.context: SEC jurisdiction over registered investment companies

legislation_refs.name: Investment Advisers Act of 1940
legislation_refs.context: SEC jurisdiction over registered investment advisers

legislation_refs.name: Consumer Financial Protection Act of 2010
legislation_refs.context: section 1002 defines covered person for CFPB jurisdiction; section 1002 also defines financial product or service

legislation_refs.name: Sarbanes-Oxley Act of 2002
legislation_refs.context: established Public Company Accounting Oversight Board; also listed as Federal securities law

legislation_refs.name: National Artificial Intelligence Initiative Act of 2020
legislation_refs.context: section 5002 defines artificial intelligence term used in this Act

legislation_refs.name: Bank Holding Company Act of 1956
legislation_refs.context: activities that are financial in nature, as defined in section 4(k)(4) of the Bank Holding Company Act of 1956

legislation_refs.name: Anti-Money Laundering and Countering the Financing of Terrorism Obligations
legislation_refs.context: consistent with the purposes of the anti-money laundering and countering the financing of terrorism obligations under subchapter II of chapter 53 of title 31

named_docs.name: AI test projects

named_docs.name: annual report on the outcomes of AI test projects
